argument-hint: Update work item `<##>` in Azure DevOps Boards for the `create-dotnet-calculator` project as per the following specifications.
---

For work item <##>, specify `40` points for the "Story Points:" field, set "Risk:" to `Low` and add the following for "Acceptance Criteria:" `The UI must resemble a physical calculator device and keypad. Make the appearance appealing with colored keys and maintain a calculation history window to the side, external to the calculator UI.` Assign the iteration path to Iteration 1 and Set the "Value area:" to `Business`.

Prompt for any required arguments or clarifications before proceeding with the update.
